zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffudd Kynaston於1395年出生在英國史洛普爾克雷文 瓦爾特運動槍有限公司時，他的父親Johnannes Kynaston14歲，母親Isolde Oerct13歲。他於1419年與Margaret Jane Hoord在英國英格蘭史洛普爾巴書其結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1476年在英國史洛普爾艾勒斯莫享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffudd Kynaston于1395年出生在英国史洛普爾克雷文 瓦爾特運動槍有限公司时，他的父亲Johnannes Kynaston14岁，母亲Isolde Oerct13岁。他于1419年与Margaret Jane Hoord在英国英格兰史洛普爾巴書其结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1476年在英国史洛普爾艾勒斯莫享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kynaston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Kynaston: in Kinnerley (Shropshire), in Hentland (Herefordshire), or in Much Marcle (Herefordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Griffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffudd Kynaston was born in 1395, in Craven Arms, Shropshire, England, his father, Johnannes Kynaston, was 14 and his mother, Isolde Oerct, was 13. He married Margaret Jane Hoord in 1419, in Baschurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1476, in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffudd Kynaston est né en 1395, à Craven Arms, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Johnannes Kynaston, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Isolde Oerct, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Jane Hoord en 1419, à Baschurch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1476, à Ellesmere, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffudd Kynaston 1395 in Craven Arms, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johnannes Kynaston 14 und seine Mutter Isolde Oerct 13. Er hat 1419 in Baschurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Jane Hoord geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1476 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffudd Kynaston è nato il nel 1395 nel Craven Arms, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Johnannes Kynaston, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Isolde Oerct, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Jane Hoord nel 1419, nel Baschurch, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1476, nel Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffudd Kynastonが1395年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアクラベン アルムズで生まれた時，父Johnannes Kynastonは14歳，母Isolde Oerctは13歳であった。1419年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアバシュルチでMargaret Jane Hoordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1476年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエレスメアで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffudd Kynaston(이)가 1395년 영국 슈럽실르 크레이븐 아스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johnannes Kynaston(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Isolde Oerct(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 바슈르치에서 Margaret Jane Hoord(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1476년 영국 슈럽실르 엘레스머에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffudd Kynaston nasceu em 1395, em Craven Arms, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Johnannes Kynaston, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Isolde Oerct, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Jane Hoord em 1419, em Baschurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1476, em Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffudd Kynaston родился в 1395 г. в местности кравен армс, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Johnannes Kynaston было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Isolde Oerct, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Jane Hoord в 1419 г. в местности бащурч, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1476 г. в местности эллесмир, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffudd Kynaston nació en 1395, en Craven Arms, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Johnannes Kynaston, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Isolde Oerct, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Margaret Jane Hoord en 1419, en Baschurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1476, en Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años.
